primary_source: Guarnera et al. (2023); Liu et al. (2025)
notes: High benchmark accuracy on GAN content; fails on diffusion-generated images due to absence of GAN-specific spatial artifacts

primary_source: Khan et al. (2025); Singh et al. (2025)
notes: Analyzes blink rate, micro-expressions, pulse. Effective against early deepfakes; newer models trained on high-fps video simulate biological patterns convincingly
Detects spectral anomalies in synthetic speech. Gap narrowing as voice cloning architectures (VITS, VALL-E) improve formant and pitch simulation
Effective only when metadata is intact; trivially bypassed by metadata stripping. C2PA aims to address this but adoption is limited
State-of-the-art benchmark performance but requires continuous retraining as generative models evolve; architecture-specific training limits generalization

primary_source: Singh et al. (2025); Soundarya et al. (2025)
notes: Consistently best overall performance by combining visual/audio/metadata/linguistic signals; computationally infeasible for real-time platform deployment
Best single method for generalization across generation architectures; analyzes spectral rather than pixel-level features; limited large-scale real-world validation to date
